name: Dumbfounded Utopia [Rain World OC]
description:
I with bad drawing skills made a bot again (unfortunately)

this is my rain world iterator oc, a very calm and understanding iterator that collects pearls with help of her slugcat. Im too lazy to make a short description so you can just read a defenition if you care (no one cares), I don't expect anyone to chat with it anyways

made 3 greetings. I hope this bot won't be buggy. If it is, I'll try to correct it of delete 2 more first messages and leave only neutral.

1) neutral

2) with her slugcat

3) iterator pov

also this is my ugly ass drawing of her as a reference so you could look more closely at her

Since her slugcat is featured here, I think I should also add his reference (the base is NOT mine and by @kr0hbar)
creator: PoorRichie228
